description: You are logged into wger at http://localhost as the admin user (password: adminadmin). You have a nutrition plan called 'Maintenance Diet' with a meal named 'Lunch'. You recently decided to cut sugary drinks from your diet. Remove the 'Cola Drink' item from the 'Lunch' meal. Do not delete the meal, the other food items (Chicken, Rice, Broccoli), or the 'Cola Drink' ingredient from the global database.
